Home / Quality Review

Internal Ledger

Quality Review

A working ledger for finding weak reconstructed prompt-response sections and returning to them branch by branch.

Quality Scope

Prompt-response coverage

This review tracks 1788 generated prompt-response sections. Average score is 94.0. Sections needing review: 0 (0.0%).

Levels are heuristic, not final judgment: strong, good, developing, and thin. “Developing” and “thin” are the backlog for hand-polish.

Weakest Sections

Start here when polishing manually
